text: Perfect date night spot. The pasta is incredible and the service is attentive without being intrusive.
Best Italian in Columbus. Get the risotto.
Beautiful neighborhood restaurant. Excellent wine list and warm atmosphere.
The wood-fired pizza is phenomenal and the crust is perfect. Great place with family.
Love that they source local ingredients. Seasonal menu keeps things interesting.
Consistently excellent. The rotating seasonal toppings are always a pleasant surprise.
The reuben here is legendary. I stop by after long runs when I deserve a treat.
Classic deli done right. The matzo ball soup is a must.
Saturday ritual - hit the North Market before or after a run. Great produce and the pastries from several vendors are outstanding.
Columbus institution. The variety of vendors is unmatched.
These folks actually know running. They watched my gait, fit me properly, and my knee issues disappeared after switching shoes. Worth every penny.
Best running store in Columbus by far. Staff are all runners and it shows.
My post-long-run Saturday treat. Excellent single-origin pour-overs and the staff always remember regulars.
Great local roaster. Better than any chain coffee shop.
Convenient location in Clintonville. Good selection of produce and iron-rich foods like beef liver and spinach. Reliable neighborhood grocery.
My go-to track for Thursday speed workouts. The 400m loop is well-maintained and the park has a great vibe in the mornings.
Beautiful park in Clintonville. Perfect for family walks and the track is always busy with runners.
Love having a Venezuelan spot right in Clintonville. Arepas are filling and delicious post-run.
Fantastic food and such a warm family atmosphere.
Anniversary dinner here was unforgettable. Derek and I loved the handmade pasta.
Love this neighborhood gem. They carry lentils, spinach, and quality iron-rich products. Plus the staff know their regulars.
Excellent PT practice. The team is highly knowledgeable and the pediatric focus is exceptional.
Great long-run destination along the Olentangy. Connects to the trail perfectly.
Classic Columbus late-night pizza. Perfect after a Friday out.
Fun atmosphere downtown. Great craft cocktails and a solid comfort food menu.
